name: Tempeh & Mushroom Stew on a Mashed Potato Bas
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small pan, bring water and 1 tablespoon soy sauce to a boil. Add the tempeh (defrosted if frozen) and lower heat. Cover and simmer for 10 minutes.
2. Turn off the heat and cover again. Let the tempeh simmer for another 10 minutes. Drain and set aside.
3. In a separate pan, chop the onion and garlic. Sauté them in oil for about a minute or two.
4. Add the sliced mushrooms to the pan and cook for another minute or two.
5. Dice the tempeh and chop the tomato. Add these to the pan with the bay leaf and remaining soy sauce. Cook uncovered for about 5 minutes, stirring frequently.
6. Mash the cooked potatoes with soy milk, vegan margarine, and seasoning to taste (or use a packet of vegan instant mashed potatoes). Make a mashed potato base.
7. Remove the bay leaf from the tempeh mixture, pile it onto the mashed potato base, and serve.
Source: The Single Vegan - by Leah Leneman
Typed for you by: Karen Mintzias
